title: Water Enhanced
description: Expands ocean gameplay with new resources, gear, and aquatic mechanics while staying true to vanilla.
body:
**Water Enhanced** is a Minecraft mod focused on expanding water-related gameplay by introducing new content, mechanics, and progression tied to ocean environments.

The mod adds new resources, equipment, and entities designed to make exploring oceans more rewarding and engaging, while staying consistent with the vanilla Minecraft experience.

🇧🇷 Fully developed by a brazilian dev!!

## 🌊 Features

* New ocean-based resource generation
* Custom tools and armor with unique properties
* A new aquatic entity with custom drops
* An enhanced progression system tied to water exploration
* Carefully designed content to feel natural within the game

## ⚙️ Technical Details

This mod was developed using the Fabric API and focuses on clean structure and maintainability. It was built as a practical project to explore Java development and Object-Oriented Programming concepts in a real-world scenario.

## 🚧 Future Plans

* New ocean creatures and boss encounters
* Expanded crafting system
* Additional water-based mechanics
* Balance improvements and polish

## 💬 Notes

This is an early version of the mod, developed while learning the fabric API, and will continue to receive updates and improvements.

Feedback is always welcome!
